title: Simple 18-Inch Doll Bed
summary: A basic four-post doll bed sized for 18-inch dolls, built entirely from 1x2 and 1x3 furring strips — simple enough for a kid to help assemble with hot glue or nails.
description:
This doll bed is deliberately built from the cheapest lumber available — 1x2 furring strips for nearly everything — and deliberately simple enough that a kid can help with final assembly. Build the two headboard/footboard ends first, each one just four boards joined into a small frame; the plan notes hot glue works fine here if you don't want to deal with screws or nails on a project this small, though screws or brad nails and glue both work too.

Once both end panels are built, attach the side rails between them to form the bed's basic shape. **A wider single board (1x6 or 1x8) works as a genuine substitute for the built-up end panels** if you'd rather skip a step, though the plan notes this raises material cost slightly since wider boards cost more per linear foot than furring strips.

The mattress platform is intentionally left open-ended: **sturdy cardboard, cut and measured by the kids themselves, is the plan's own suggested material** rather than a dedicated wood or plywood panel — a genuinely kid-friendly way to finish the last step of an otherwise adult-built frame.

materials.name: 1/4" plywood or sturdy cardboard, for mattress support
Hot glue, or brad nails, 1-1/4", and glue

cutList.material: 1/4" plywood or sturdy cardboard, for mattress support

steps.title: Build the headboard and footboard
steps.body: Build two end panels, joining the verticals and top/bottom rails with screws, nails, or hot glue.
materials: Hot glue, or brad nails, 1-1/4", and glue

steps.title: Attach the side rails
steps.body: Attach the bed base support side rails to the two end panels with screws, nails, or hot glue.
materials: Hot glue, or brad nails, 1-1/4", and glue

steps.title: Add the mattress platform
steps.body: Have kids measure and cut a mattress platform from sturdy cardboard (or 1/4" plywood) and place inside the assembled bed frame.
materials: 1/4" plywood or sturdy cardboard, for mattress support

images.alt: Simple wooden doll bed sized for 18-inch dolls
